import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import './Home.css'; const STEPS = [ { number: '01', title: 'Browse Materials', description: 'Explore surplus items from LA28 venues across the city — furniture, equipment, structures, and more.', }, { number: '02', title: 'Describe Your Needs', description: 'Tell our AI matching engine what your organization needs. It finds the best fits from available inventory.', }, { number: '03', title: 'Claim & Coordinate', description: 'Claim your match and arrange pickup directly with the venue. No middlemen, no cost.', }, ]; const FEATURED = [ { id: 1, name: 'Folding Tables', category: 'Furniture', quantity: 120, location: 'Exposition Park', condition: 'Good', image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1530124566582-a618bc2615dc?w=600' }, { id: 4, name: 'Tents & Canopies', category: 'Structures', quantity: 45, location: 'UCLA Campus', condition: 'Like New', image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1478131143081-80f7f84ca84d?w=600' }, { id: 6, name: 'PA Audio Systems', category: 'Electronics', quantity: 30, location: 'Pasadena', condition: 'Good', image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1511379938547-c1f69419868d?w=600' }, ]; const CONDITION_COLORS = { 'Like New': '#2e7d32', 'Good': '#1565c0', 'Fair': '#e65100', }; export default function Home() { return ( <>
